hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || true); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "\b(kill|pkill|killall)\b"; then echo "BLOCKED: kill/pkill/killall are not allowed in worker sessions" >&2; exit 1; fi'
